label: Fixed
items: Harvest tasks now appear in the day panel when you tap ANY day inside the window — not just on the window's start date. Previously, backfilled window tasks were anchored to a past start date, so clicking today (or any mid-window day) showed an empty panel under the green tint.

Calendar dots remain clean — a single dot still only appears on the original due_date, so the grid doesn't get cluttered when several harvest windows overlap. The green tint is still the visual cue for "window is active on this day".
